generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data collection for vehicle environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARRawDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data received by the virtual twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR point cloud data into structured object tracks"
]

instance StructuredObjectTracksTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudClusteringTrackingComponent
]

instance StructuredObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks derived from LiDAR data processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StructuredObjectTracksTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler
]

instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for all data streams"
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables data monitoring services including visualization and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables cloud-based computation offloading for ACC processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables remote management capabilities for operators and developers"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Translates and serializes data for consistent message formats"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2IntraSystemEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles intra-system communication using ROS2 protocol"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance WiFiUDPInterEntityEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Transmits data between entities via Wi-Fi using UDP protocol"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data visualization, projected driving path, detected object tracks, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transfers ACC system processing (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, actuation commands) to cloud resources to alleviate on-board hardware constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ActuationCommandProcessing
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, send emergency braking commands developers use data collection for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisable, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand, DataCollectionForTroubleshooting
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saves vehicle data for later analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates reports from collected data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detects lead vehicle using cloud-based processing"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Calculates appropriate speed based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandProcessing : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates actuation commands for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables or disables Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets the desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sends emergency braking command to vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataCollectionForTroubleshooting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Collects data for developer troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands including desired speed calculation, emergency braking, and ACC enable/disable are transmitted from the DT to the physical vehicle via Wi-Fi UDP. The Data Translation component serializes control messages for actuation systems such as motor, steering servo, and vehicle state control. ROS2 facilitates communication between control components, and commands are executed by the Actuation FE and steering servo components."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Synchronization between physical and digital components requires 100 ms accuracy for safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by hardware limitations. This temporal granularity ensures precise coordination for computation offloading and real-time data processing."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system follows the ISO 23247 reference architecture with three entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User), each implemented as ROS2 packages containing one or more ROS2 nodes. The Physical Twin Entity departs from ISO standard by hosting general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), and all entities are deployed on separate hardware components. Coordination is managed through ROS2's communication framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. The system requires low end-to-end latency to support real-time ACC operations, with data serialization and translation managed by the Data Translation component."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Computation offloading for ACC is performed on cloud infrastructure to alleviate resource constraints of vehicle ECUs. Specific hosting platforms, storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and deployment models beyond cloud-based computation are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems uses ROS2 for internal communication and references OPC Unified Architecture as a potential protocol for data exchange and interoperability per ISO 23247 standard guidelines."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247-2:2021 reference architecture, defining entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) perform tasks including data transformation to human-interpretable formats, actuation, and user interfacing, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) specified as an implementation technology for FEs."
]
